heading: Fiscal procedures assistance
label: 1952 Fiscal procedures assistance
text: Upon request of the Government of Palau, the Secretary of the Interior shall provide assistance to the Government of Palau to develop and promulgate regulations for the effective expenditure of funds received pursuant to this joint resolution, Public Laws 99–658 [ et seq.] and 99–239 [ et seq., 2001 et seq.], or any other Act of Congress.48 U.S.C. 193148 U.S.C. 1901
notes: References in TextThis joint resolution, referred to in text, is , , , which enacted this part and sections 1846 and 1972 of this title, amended sections 1615 and 1933 of this title and , Crime Control and Law Enforcement, and enacted provisions set out as a note under , Public Printing and Documents.
